name: signacare-asr-bench-seed
description: Reproducible seed corpus for the Signacare ASR benchmark. Each entry pins an audio path (relative to the corpus root supplied via --corpus-root), the duration bucket the operator brief enumerates (5m / 15m / 60m), the reference transcript (verbatim, no PHI), and the seed used by the harness to randomise nothing — every run is deterministic in clip order so successive runs are diff-able.
phaseContext: Phase 7 — ASR benchmark + performance upgrade lane

clips.notes: Synthetic dialog — adult community psychiatry intake. No real patient data.
Synthetic dialog — review encounter with medication titration.
Synthetic dialog — psychiatric review with risk assessment.
Synthetic dialog — discharge planning + safety plan revision.
Synthetic dialog — long-form initial assessment + formulation.
